reference: I just discovered a tiny black mole on my six-month-old's lower back. About one month after he was born, I was diagnosed with malignant melanoma, only stage one. I had surgery to remove the cancer, but I am now fearful it could have spread to him during my pregnancy.
text: I just discovered a tiny black mole on my 6-month-old's lower back. About 1 month after he was born, I was diagnosed with malignant melanoma, only stage 1. I had surgery to remove the cancer, but I am now fearful it threatened him during my pregnancy.
